CORE Suggestions

Approve thumbnail v3. Review one priority task. Recording in 22h.

Workspace people

Add people to the workspace, then assign selected people to this project.

Owner Permissions

Role Permission Presets

Set default powers for each role, then override individual people when needed.

Project Chats

Choose who can see it. Private rooms are not visible to everyone.

# Open Project Chat

Everyone assigned to the project can see this.

Project Chat

OS Messages

System-wide messages between anyone using CSorro OS.

Sticky Notes

Quick project thoughts. Convert any sticky into a task.

Shapes preview while dragging. Text appears on the whiteboard as a box. Saved boards appear in the Project Whiteboards list.

Project Whiteboards

Retrieve, delete or continue a saved board.

CORE Project Assistant

Talk to CORE about this project. Prototype can summarise, explain permissions and create simple tasks.

Privacy by default

Project Showcase

Internal work stays private. Only publish selected portfolio/career/project sections when the owner chooses.
